# terrible_dellemc_openmanage_ome_device_mgmt_network (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delay` (Number) The time in seconds, after which settings are applied. This option is applicable only for Chassis.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `device_id` (Number) ID of the device. This option is mutually exclusive with *device_service_tag*.
- `device_service_tag` (String) Service tag of the device. This option is mutually exclusive with *device_id*.
- `dns_configuration` (String) Domain Name System(DNS) settings.
- `dns_server_settings` (String) DNS server settings. This is applicable only for I/O Module.
- `enable_nic` (Boolean) Enable or disable Network Interface Card (NIC) configuration of the device. This option is not applicable to I/O Module.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ipv4_configuration` (String) IPv4 network configuration. `WARNING` Ensure that you have an alternate interface to access OpenManage Enterprise Modular because these options can change the current IPv4 address for *hostname*.
- `ipv6_configuration` (String) IPv6 network configuration. `WARNING` Ensure that you have an alternate interface to access OpenManage Enterprise Modular because these options can change the current IPv6 address for *hostname*.
- `management_vlan` (String) VLAN configuration.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `error_info` (String) Details of the HTTP Error.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `msg` (String) Overall status of the network config operation.
